name: Sparxie
desc: Like! Follow! Stream! Views! Party till the world ends!\nSparxie and Sparkle, the Mask and the Fool are fundamentally the same.\nWhoever is seen, whoever is liked, is the correct answer!

1.name: #GoingViral #WhoIsShe
1.desc: When Aha Instant ends, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u>. For every 1 <u>Punchline</u> owned, increases All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> for all allies by <unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak>, up to a max increase of <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

2.name: #AudienceKnows
2.desc: When Aha Instant ends, Sparxie gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> and <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Thrill." For every 1 "Thrill" consumed, increases this unit's CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s) and stacking up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s).

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

3.name: #LinkUp #HeartSkip
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: #LockedIn #FaceCard
4.desc: When using Ultimate, additionally gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u> and increases this unit's Elation by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

5.name: #HealingTheWorld #GoodVibesOnly
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nElation Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: #BuiltDifferent #GoingExtinct
6.desc: Increases All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. For every <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u> taken into account, the number of additional DMG instances dealt by the Elation Skill increases by 1, up to a max of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

150101.name: Cat Got Your Flametongue?
150101.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Sparxie's ATK to one designated enemy.
150101.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy.

150102.name: Boom! Sparxicle's Poppin'
150102.desc: Start a livestream to turn Basic ATK into "Bloom! Winner Takes All" and trigger "Engagement Farming" 1 time. During this ability, "Engagement Farming" can be triggered repeatedly, up to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s). Using this ability is not considered as using a Skill.
150102.simple_desc: Start a livestream to turn Basic ATK into "Bloom! Winner Takes All" and trigger "Engagement Farming" 1 time. "Engagement Farming" can be <color=#f29e38ff>triggered repeatedly</color> during this ability.

150103.name: Party's Wildin' and Camera's Rollin'
150103.desc: Gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u> point(s). Deals Fire DMG equal to (<unbreak>#3[f1]</unbreak> × Elation + <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>) of Sparxie's ATK to all enemies.
150103.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Gains <u>Punchline</u></color>. Deals Fire DMG to all enemies.

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

150104.name: Sleight of Sparx Hand
150104.desc: While Sparxie holds "<u>Certified Banger</u>":\nUsing Enhanced Basic ATK deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> Fire <u>Elation DMG</u> to one designated enemy, and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> Fire <u>Elation DMG</u> to their adjacent targets. Additionally, for every 1 instance of "Engagement Farming" triggered, the Enhanced Basic ATK deals 1 extra instance of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> Fire <u>Elation DMG</u> to 1 random attacked enemy target.\nUsing Ultimate deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> Fire <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies.
150104.simple_desc: While Sparxie holds "<u>Certified Banger</u>," using Enhanced Basic ATK or Ultimate deals Fire <u>Elation DMG</u> to enemies.

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

10000029.name: Certified Banger
10000029.desc: Characters participating in the Aha Instant gain the "Certified Banger" state. And the Punchline points from the current Aha Instant are taken into account for this state, lasting for 2 turns. Ability effects and Elation DMG produced by the "Certified Banger" state are calculated based on the Punchline points taken into account.\nPunchline points taken into account for multiple "Certified Banger" states are combined for the calculation.\nThe duration of each "Certified Banger" state is tracked independently.

150106.name: Attack
150106.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

150107.name: Content Monetization
150107.desc: After using the Technique, inflicts enemies within a set area with "Block" for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> second(s). "Blocked" enemies cannot detect ally targets.\nAfter entering combat via actively attacking a "Blocked" enemy, deals Fire DMG to all enemies equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Sparxie's ATK and recovers <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) for allies.
150107.simple_desc: Inflicts "Block" on all enemies within a set area. After entering combat via attacking a "Blocked" enemy, deals minor Fire DMG to all enemies and <color=#f29e38ff>recovers Skill Points</color>.

150108.name: Bloom! Winner Takes All
150108.desc: Finalizes the livestream. Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Sparxie's ATK to one designated enemy, and Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Sparxie's ATK to adjacent targets.
150108.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy and minor Fire DMG to adjacent targets.

150109.name: Engagement Farming
150109.desc:
Causes "Bloom! Winner Takes All" to increase the DMG multiplier against one designated enemy by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> and the DMG multiplier against adjacent targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[f1]%</unbreak></color>. Randomly gains one of the following gifts:
"Straight Fire": <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u> point(s) and <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill point(s).
"Unreal Banger": <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u> point(s).
Using this ability is not considered as using a Skill.
150109.simple_desc: Increases the DMG multiplier of "Bloom! Winner Takes All" and randomly gains one of following gifts: "Straight Fire" or "Unreal Banger."

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

150120.name: Signal Overflow: The Great Encore!
150120.desc: Deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> Fire <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies and deals <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> additional instance(s) of DMG. Each instance deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> Fire <u>Elation DMG</u> to one random enemy. Grants <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> "Thrill" point(s) to Sparxie, which can be used to offset Sparxie's Skill Point consumption. Consuming "Thrill" is considered as consuming Skill Points.
150120.simple_desc: Deals Fire <u>Elation DMG</u> to all enemies. Then, deals minor Fire <u>Elation DMG</u> to one enemy, bouncing <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> time(s).<color=#f29e38ff> Gains "Thrill" that can offset Skill Point consumption</color>.

10000028.name: Elation DMG
10000028.desc: The more Punchline taken into account, and the higher the Elation and Character Level, the greater the Elation DMG dealt.\nElation DMG is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

1.point_desc: For every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> of Sparxie's ATK that exceeds <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, increases this unit's Elation by <unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak>, up to a maximum increase of <unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak>.

When there are 1/2/≥3 Elation characters in the team, using Sparxie's Ultimate will additionally gain <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> <u>Punchline</u> and <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>/<unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>/<unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> "Thrill".

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.

1.point_name: Frenzy! Palette of Truth and Lies
1.point_desc: For every 1 <u>Punchline</u> currently owned, increases all allies' CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, up to a max increase of <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

10000027.name: Punchline
10000027.desc: Punchline is shared by the whole team. When dealing Elation DMG, the more Punchline taken into account, the higher the Elation DMG.
